title: Pill Crusher, Mini Marble and Pestle Set, Pill Crusher Grinder Fine Powder, Arthritic Hands Pill Grinder
description:
About this item
【The easy way】The idea of the mortar and pestle goes back a long, long time and continues to this day. Pills are gently crushed and ground into a fine powder
【NO RESIDUE: The inside of the marble pill crusher is hand polished to a very smooth finish, and you can easily remove all the powder with the included small brush
【PROTECT YOUR WRIST】Usual plastic rotary grinders require the wrist to rotate very hard, which is not good for arthritis patients. Marble Pill Grinder.
【EASY TO CLEAN】The inside and outside of the mortar have been sanded and polished to a very smooth finish, just rinse with water and it looks brand new
【Package】1x pill grinder，1 x pill organizer , 1 x pill cutter, 1 x small brush
reviews_5s: The size of this Mortar that works really well. I recently used this to grind up some Vitamin C tablets that I preferred to mix with my vitamin water and this tool worked great. I purchased a larger Mortar to handle the size of the vitamin tablets I had at the time. The Mortar was easy to clean once I was done and packed right back into the box to keep it nice if I have to use it again. Great tool.This is perfect for crushing aspirin - it’s the perfect size for a bathroom counter and it’s well made. Easy to use - and I like the look. Very pleased!!It is extremely small which is fine for me because it doesn't take up much space and it works well to grind up pills.I got this pill crusher because my doctor's office gave me a plastic pill crusher that wasn't really crushing my pills. This thing is awesome. I'm able to crush all my pills at once, and very finely. So convenient.I bought this to crush some whole spices for making tea, a situation, where I don't want the powdered spice to cloud my tea, or a clear-broth soup, where it is good to break up the whole seeds or a bit of broth. I would not ask us to do a large amount of spices to powder, but that's not why I bought it and it's perfect for the small quantities, compact to store, and it looks good out on the counter if I don't want to put it away. It's also very good for crushing pills for the cats.Item was perfect would highly Recommended ordering from sellerI immediately put a pill in it and tried it. It worked well.I use this to crush my son pills up and it works great ! Better than crushing them with the back of the spoon like I was doing for years 🤣Works better for crushing pills tha the so called pill crusher. The design is worthy of MOMAI think it will be great. 😊
reviews_1s: it was smaller then expected... the trash took it.After a month it grinder brokeSeriously this is the tiniest thing ever! And it's super hard to crush a tiny pill (which is why I ordered it, to crush tiny pills for my puppy) it's now just a decoration piece on top of my stove beside my salt and pepper shakers! It looks like a doll house toy!Too small
